note: UCI Online Retail II (Chen 2019, CC-BY 4.0). Aggregated 2010 calendar-year data by month and store/country; revenue converted GBP to USD using a documented 2010 reference rate.
source_citation: Chen, D. (2019). Online Retail II [Dataset]. UCI Machine Learning Repository. https://doi.org/10.24432/C5CG6D

entries.description: Monthly aggregate sales data for three stores/countries across the 2010 calendar year.
